change_log.summary: Mapped legacy documentation data into the canonical schema; no clinical approval claimed.
Removed preconfirmed content and applied deterministic safety/consistency fixes; clinical review remains required.
Independent final automated audit completed; no clinical approval claimed.

unresolved_issues.summary: An authoritative source family was mapped, but exact workflow-level chapters and applicability still require qualified review.
52 prompts use generic “relevant to … if assessed” wording; condition-specific clinical review is required.

local_adaptation_notes: No guideline recommendation is converted into a patient-specific action.

relevant_guideline_sections.applicability_note: Direct source-family match only. Exact workflow-level recommendations remain excluded pending qualified source review.
sections: Whole-source scope screened; workflow-specific chapter verification pending

exclusion_notes: This scaffold does not determine diagnosis, treatment, referral, escalation, or disposition.
inclusion_notes: Document presentation and scope relevant to Vaccination visit if assessed by the clinician.
special_population_notes: Use age-appropriate paediatric documentation and clinician-entered weight/vital signs.
workflow_limitations: Documentation support only; source mapping and clinical content require qualified clinician review.
